test.name: Több termék hozzáadása

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Error sending stats to Plausible: error sending request for url (https://plausible.io/api/event)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Add items to cart
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: WebDriver session does not exist, or is not active; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: RemoteError@chrome://remote/content/shared/RemoteError.sys.mjs:8:8 WebDriverError@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Errors.sys.mjs:199:5 InvalidSessionIDError@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Errors.sys.mjs:469:5 assert.that/<@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Assert.sys.mjs:559:13 assert.session@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Assert.sys.mjs:37:4 despatch@chrome://remote/content/marionette/server.sys.mjs:315:19 execute@chrome://remote/content/marionette/server.sys.mjs:289:16 onPacket/<@chrome://remote/content/marionette/server.sys.mjs:262:20 onPacket@chrome://remote/content/marionette/server.sys.mjs:263:9 _onJSONObjectReady/<@chrome://remote/content/marionette/transport.sys.mjs:494:20

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element

kw.name: Sleep

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Login To Saucedemo mainpage
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: WebDriver session does not exist, or is not active; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: RemoteError@chrome://remote/content/shared/RemoteError.sys.mjs:8:8 WebDriverError@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Errors.sys.mjs:199:5 InvalidSessionIDError@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Errors.sys.mjs:469:5 assert.that/<@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Assert.sys.mjs:559:13 assert.session@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Assert.sys.mjs:37:4 despatch@chrome://remote/content/marionette/server.sys.mjs:315:19 execute@chrome://remote/content/marionette/server.sys.mjs:289:16 onPacket/<@chrome://remote/content/marionette/server.sys.mjs:262:20 onPacket@chrome://remote/content/marionette/server.sys.mjs:263:9 _onJSONObjectReady/<@chrome://remote/content/marionette/transport.sys.mjs:494:20
